title: SCPN Phase Orchestrator: Domain-Agnostic Coherence Control Compiler
description: A domain-agnostic coherence control compiler built on Kuramoto/UPDE phase dynamics. Features a 3-channel oscillator model (Physical/Informational/Symbolic), coupling matrix management with exponential decay, regime-aware supervision, and a Rust kernel (spo-kernel) with PyO3 FFI bindings.
notes: Part of the SCPN (Self-Consistent Phenomenological Network) research framework by ANULUM.
